nasb.text: My tongue also will utter Your righteousness all day long; For they are ashamed, for they are humiliated who seek my hurt.

esv.text: And my tongue will talk of your righteous help all the day long, for they have been put to shame and disappointed who sought to do me hurt.

cnv.text: 我的舌頭也要終日講述你的公義， 因為那些謀求害我的人已經蒙羞受辱了。

ccb.text: 我要终日向人述说你的公义， 因为那些想害我的人已经蒙羞受辱。

csbs.text: 我的舌头也要终日述说你的公义， 因为那些谋害我的已经抱愧蒙羞。
